Package org.areslib.hardware

Class AresHardwareManager

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.hardware.AresHardwareManager
public class AresHardwareManager extends Object
Global manager for physical and simulated hardware environments in ARESLib.

This class abstracts the initialization and persistent state of advanced FTC coprocessors such as the OctoQuad (V1/V2) and custom SRS Hubs. It also manages system-level power inputs like battery voltage and floodgate (current) sensors, computing a safe dynamic power scaling factor to prevent robot brownouts.

  • Field Details

    • batteryVoltage

      public static double batteryVoltage
      The last measured system battery voltage.

    • totalCurrentAmps

      public static double totalCurrentAmps
      The last measured total chassis current in Amps.

    • masterPowerScale

      public static double masterPowerScale
      The computed master power multiplier (0.0 to 1.0) applied to chassis actuators.

  • Constructor Details

    • AresHardwareManager

      public AresHardwareManager()

  • Method Details

    • setCurrentEmaAlpha

      public static void setCurrentEmaAlpha(double alpha)
      Sets the EMA filter alpha for the current sensor. Must be in [0.0, 1.0]. Higher alpha means faster response but more noise.
      Parameters:
      alpha - The new alpha value.

    • getActiveSrsHub

      public static SRSHub getActiveSrsHub()
      Retrieves the currently active SRS Coprocessor Hub, if configured.
      Returns:
      The active SRSHub, or null if absent.

    • getActiveOctoQuad

      public static AresOctoQuadDriver getActiveOctoQuad()
      Retrieves the currently active OctoQuad Encoder interface, if configured.
      Returns:
      The active AresOctoQuadDriver, or null if absent.

    • initHardware

      public static void initHardware(com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.HardwareMap hardwareMap)
      Initializes the static hardware dependencies required for the ARESLib environment. This method automatically attempts to detect high-performance coprocessors and sets up the system power monitoring.
      Parameters:
      hardwareMap - The active robot HardwareMap provided by the current OpMode.

    • getBatteryVoltage

      public static double getBatteryVoltage()
      Gets the current, globally cached battery voltage.
      Returns:
      Battery voltage in volts.

    • updatePowerStatus

      public static void updatePowerStatus()
      Calculates and updates the dynamic power scaling metrics based on current power draw and system voltage. Updates the underlying logging inputs to telemetry.

    • updateCoprocessors

      public static void updateCoprocessors()
      Called iteratively to update odometry coprocessors or vision pipelines asynchronously.

    • clearCoprocessorCaches

      public static void clearCoprocessorCaches()
      Forces standard I2C cache refreshes for the bulk reads natively provided by hardware vendors.

    • calculateLoadSheddedLimit

      public static double calculateLoadSheddedLimit(double maxCurrent, double minCurrent, double nominalVoltage, double criticalVoltage)
      Helper function for mechanisms to compute their dynamically shedded current limit based on bus voltage. Linearly scales current limits back when voltage sags between NOMINAL and CRITICAL.
